Harness surface is collapsed to a minimal local loop with no Render/Linear/cleanup orchestration scripts.

verify.js now runs tests + isolated boot + smoke only

acceptance_criteria.text: Runtime is simplified to core shop operations while dispatch-board complexity is removed.
